import json
d=json.load(open('.claude/settings.local.json',encoding='utf-8'))
h=d.get('hooks',{})
print('hook 事件:',list(h.keys()))
for ev,arr in h.items():
    for g in arr:
        for hk in g.get('hooks',[]):
            cmd=hk.get('command','')
            print(f'  [{ev}] matcher={g.get(\"matcher\",\"\")!r:30} -> {cmd[:90]}')
"
echo "=== 有沒有現成的 facts / source-of-truth 檔？ ==="
ls -l
